name: @act-spec/strapi-adapter
description: PRD-205 Strapi adapter for the ACT (Agent Content Tree) v0.1 reference implementation. Consumes the Strapi v4/v5 REST (default) or GraphQL Content API and emits PRD-100/PRD-102 envelopes; supports content-type / field mapping, markdown body emission with optional split into prose/code/callout, dynamic-zone components → marketing:*, relation resolution with cycle tolerance, locale fan-out via Strapi i18n plugin, updatedAt-marker delta, and HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature verification. Implements the PRD-200 framework contract.
